title: Senior Software Engineer - Quikr - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Quikr - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quikr family as a Senior Software Engineer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quikr:
Quikr is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr!
